Description.SourceString:
Think of perks a little like status effects that don’t want to kill you. They’re friendly, helpful even. Certain foods, drinks, potions and other things, may give you temporary benefits. These benefits, called perks, might be resistances to certain effects, or perhaps they’ll give you an edge in combat.

There are several perks to discover and mastering them will make your adventures much easier.
